title: A 10-mile ride turned into a 1,000-mile spiritual quest - Adam Brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Adam Brown about a transformative 1,000-mile journey that began as a 10-mile ride. The episode explores personal growth and spiritual discovery through extended travel and self-reflection.
